en_title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu Suffers 69% Drop at the Box Office
cn_title: 《星球大战：曼达洛人与古古》次周票房暴跌69%
subtitle: 除了铁粉，没人看了？
opus_summary: 《星球大战：曼达洛人与古古》上映第二周末仅收2500万美元，较首周暴跌69%，全球累计2.46亿美元。尽管预算仅1.65亿美元（星战系列最低），但大幅下滑表明除了铁杆粉丝外，普通观众对该系列的热情未能持续。此前该片在第三位落后于低成本恐怖片《后室》和《Obsession》。IGN评分5/10。

paragraphs.en: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu Suffers 69% Drop at the Box Office
paragraphs.cn: 《星球大战：曼达洛人与古古》次周票房暴跌69%

paragraphs.en: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu struggled to find success in its second weekend in theaters, resulting in a 69% drop at the box office.
paragraphs.cn: 《星球大战：曼达洛人与古古》上映第二周末表现挣扎，票房暴跌69%。

paragraphs.en: The Disney+ show's transition to the big screen had a domestic haul of $25 million from 4,300 locations in weekend two. That's a significant falloff from its $102 million debut that puts its domestic total at $137 million, while its international box office sits at $109 million ($246 million globally).
paragraphs.cn: 这部Disney+剧集的大银幕转型之作，次周末在4300家影院收获2500万美元本土票房。相比首周末1.02亿美元的开画成绩大幅下滑，本土累计1.37亿美元，海外票房1.09亿美元（全球累计2.46亿美元）。

paragraphs.en: The Mandalorian and Grogu attracted audiences with an estimated $165 million global total upon its May 22, 2026, release date. Failure to maintain any sort of momentum suggests die-hard fans mostly showed up for its relatively lukewarm debut weekend just to catch Star Wars' return to theaters. The last time moviegoers traveled to a galaxy far, far away with a big-screen adventure was nearly seven years ago with the launch of Star Wars: Episode 9 – The Rise of Skywalker .
paragraphs.cn: 《曼达洛人与古古》于2026年5月22日上映，全球首周票房约1.65亿美元。未能保持任何势头表明，在其相对平淡的首周末，主要是铁杆粉丝为了见证《星球大战》重返影院而捧场。观众上一次在大银幕上前往遥远的星系冒险，还是近七年前的《星球大战9：天行者崛起》。

paragraphs.en: While Disney failed to rekindle the once-dominating popularity of the franchise, movie watchers still turned out to theaters through the final weekend in May. The Mandalorian and Grogu's soft second weekend put it in third place, domestically, behind low-budget horror projects Backrooms (first) and Obsession (second). The former enjoyed a successful debut weekend through the last three days, while the latter paraded through its third weekend amid strong word-of-mouth.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管迪士尼未能重燃该系列曾经的统治级人气，但五月的最后一个周末，观众仍走进了影院。《曼达洛人与古古》次周末表现疲软，本土票房位列第三，落后于低成本恐怖片《后室》（第一）和《Obsession》（第二）。前者在最后三天迎来了成功的首周末，后者则凭借强劲口碑迈入第三周末。

paragraphs.en: Directed by Jon Favreau and starring Pedro Pascal, The Mandalorian and Grogu could have marked a return to glory for Star Wars but seems to be coasting through space for now. Its box-office setback suggests Disney is still having a hard time getting audiences to care about theatrical releases for the sci-fi franchise it purchased back in 2012 , but there are a few silver linings.
paragraphs.cn: 由Jon Favreau执导、Pedro Pascal主演的《曼达洛人与古古》，本可能标志着《星球大战》重归荣耀，但目前看来似乎只是在太空中随波逐流。其票房受挫表明，对于这个2012年收购的科幻系列，迪士尼仍难以让观众关心其院线发行，不过也有一线希望。

paragraphs.en: Variety reported that the spin-off movie came in at the low end of Star Wars films with a $165 million budget. That doesn't account for marketing costs, but it's hard to call Din Djarin's big-screen debut a failure at this stage. There's also the fact that The Mandalorian and Grogu will likely pull more eyes its way once it inevitably drops onto Disney+ alongside The Mandalorian show that helped kick off Disney's streaming endeavors back in 2019.
paragraphs.cn: 据《综艺》报道，这部衍生电影的预算为1.65亿美元，在《星球大战》系列中处于低位。这还不包括营销成本，但现阶段很难将丁·贾伦的大银幕首秀称为失败。此外，一旦《曼达洛人与古古》最终登陆Disney+，与2019年帮助迪士尼开启流媒体征程的《曼达洛人》剧集并列，它很可能会吸引更多目光。

paragraphs.en: How Much Every Star Wars Movie Made Opening Weekend
paragraphs.cn: 每部《星球大战》电影首周末票房一览

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, despite some middling reviews from critics (we gave it a 5/10 ), The Mandalorian and Grogu has still found success from the average Star Wars watcher. While the movie has drawn criticism for its story and characters, there are those online who have praised its action set-pieces and frequent use of practical effects.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，尽管影评人评价褒贬不一（我们给出了5/10分），《曼达洛人与古古》仍在普通《星球大战》观众中取得了成功。虽然影片的故事和角色受到批评，但网上也有人称赞其动作场面和对实体特效的大量运用。

paragraphs.en: IGN ranked all of the Star Wars movies from worst to best and recently added The Mandalorian's theatrical outing to the list. To see what's next for the franchise, you can click here .
paragraphs.cn: IGN对所有《星球大战》电影进行了从最差到最佳的排名，最近将《曼达洛人》的院线之旅加入了榜单。要了解该系列的后续动态，可点击此处。

paragraphs.en: Michael Cripe is a freelance writer with IGN. He's best known for his work at sites like The Pitch, The Escapist, and OnlySP. Be sure to give him a follow on Bluesky (@mikecripe.bsky.social) and Twitter (@MikeCripe).
paragraphs.cn: Michael Cripe是IGN的自由撰稿人，以在The Pitch、The Escapist和OnlySP等网站的作品而闻名。欢迎在Bluesky（@mikecripe.bsky.social）和Twitter（@MikeCripe）上关注他。
